summary: Existing ProofTrace captures summary stats only (height, axioms_used, rules_applied); all 888 valid records in the 53K deep dataset are height=0 single-axiom proofs. Recommended approach: build a new extractStepSequence Lean function that walks DerivationTree objects from the ~108 Theorems/ definitions, compiling into a new lake exe proof_extractor. This yields ~500-1600 step triples matching the 49-action space. Augmentation (higher-complexity formulas, temporal duals, context variation) needed to reach 10K-20K examples. LeanDojo/lean-interact not applicable for this project's custom DerivationTree proof system.

artifacts.summary: Full analysis of existing proof infrastructure, dataset format audit, extraction strategy comparison, step-sequence schema design, scale considerations, and 3-phase implementation plan
